title: Tagging in updates
excerpt:
sometimes we tag people in our updates, 
the people are all in the peoples board, but some have the same name 
inthese cases it would be handy to see not only the persons last name but also the first name 
is this possib…

posts.author: Mirco0 (Mirco Dalla Lana)
posts.cookedHtml:
sometimes we tag people in our updates,
the people are all in the peoples board, but some have the same name
inthese cases it would be handy to see not only the persons last name but also the first name
is this possible in monday?

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: If you do an @-mention, you will get a dropdown of the people to choose from. These are unique. When choosing someone the entire name of the person is inserted.
